/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkes_amcl_map.so -o ../../../../../libfawkes_amcl_map.so CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_map.dir/map.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_map.dir/map_cspace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_map.dir/map_range.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_map.dir/map_store.c.o CMakeFiles/fawkes_amcl_map.dir/map_draw.c.o  -lm
